name: claude-loadout
description: Personal Claude Code loadout: a pre-commit secret gate and a configurable corporate GitLab fork->MR workflow. Add this marketplace on any machine, install the plugins you want.

plugins.name: secret-guard
plugins.description: Pre-commit secret gate: a PreToolUse hook scans staged changes and blocks commits carrying secrets, plus a semantic review subagent. Zero config.

plugins.name: corporate-gitlab
plugins.description: Configurable corporate GitLab workflow: fork->MR push guard, commit identity + sign-off + Jira-key gate, and a skill teaching the flow. Set CORP_GIT_* env vars, then run /corporate-gitlab:setup once per machine.
